mapper.select: select id, project_id, title, introduction, `detail`, create_time from p_project_news where id = #{id}
select id, project_id, title, introduction, `detail`, create_time from p_project_news where project_id = #{projectId} limit #{offset},#{pageSize}
mapper.insert: insert into p_project_news (id, project_id, title, introduction, create_time, detail) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.update:
update p_project_news
project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduction = #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
detail = #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update p_project_news set project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, introduction = #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, detail = #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
